name: Perspecta Inc.
description: Perspecta Inc. was an American government services company headquartered in Chantilly, Virginia, that provided mission-critical information technology and mission support services to various U.S. government agencies. The company specialized in enterprise IT, digital transformation, and cybersecurity solutions for defense, intelligence, and civilian sectors. Following its formation through the merger of DXC Technology’s U.S. public sector business and Vencore and KeyPoint Government Solutions, Perspecta operated as a publicly traded entity on the NYSE until it was acquired by Peraton in May 2021, effectively integrating its capabilities into Peraton’s broader national security and mission-focused portfolio.
